general_info.definition: graphene quantum dots-sensitized TiO2 nanotube arrays

structural.crystallinity: XRD peak at 14.8° corresponding to (002) reflection of graphene oxide

applications.performance: GQDs/TiO2 NTs nanohybrids exhibited significantly enhanced visible-light PEC activity
applications.comparative_advantage: high sensitivity, good selectivity, acceptable reproducibility and stability

feedback.label: Good
